task_completion.description: Set up the basic letter content including the sender, date, and body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a document containing 'GlobalTrade Consulting', the date 'December 15, 2024', and text representing a standard compliance notice.

task_completion.description: Connect the document to the clients.csv data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Mail Merge recipient list or data source selection dialog showing 'clients.csv' loaded, or the Mailings ribbon indicating an active recipient list.

task_completion.description: Insert the required merge fields into the address block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for merge field placeholders like «ContactName», «CompanyName», «Address», «City», «PostalCode», and «Country» arranged in an address format in the document.

task_completion.description: Insert the ContactName merge field into the greeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a greeting line such as 'Dear «ContactName»,' or similar in the document.

task_completion.description: Save the mail merge template document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or the application title bar showing the file saved as 'notification_letter.docx' in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ directory.

task_completion.description: Execute the mail merge to generate letters for all clients.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the final merged document containing actual data instead of placeholders (e.g., 'Maria Anders', 'Alfreds Futterkiste', 'Thomas Hardy') and multiple pages/sections for the 8 records.
Look for a 'Save As' dialog or the application title bar showing the merged file saved as 'merged_letters.docx' in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a word processor GUI (like Microsoft Word) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Microsoft Word interface or a similar word processor GUI. The agent should not be writing Python scripts or using terminal commands to generate the .docx files.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's Mail Merge feature rather than manually typing out the letters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the presence of Mail Merge field placeholders (e.g., «ContactName») in the template document and the use of the 'Finish & Merge' or similar functionality.

integrity.description: The merged document is populated with data from the CSV, not hardcoded text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The merged document should show multiple pages with different client details (e.g., Maria Anders, Thomas Hardy, Christina Berglund) corresponding to the 8 records in the dataset.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The data source contains 8 synthetic records from the Northwind database. Expected sample names in the merged document include 'Maria Anders', 'Thomas Hardy', and 'Christina Berglund'. The task description explicitly requires the date 'December 15, 2024' and a 'standard compliance notice' (ignore any conflicting metadata dates). The sender must be 'GlobalTrade Consulting'. The template must use actual merge fields («ContactName», «CompanyName», «Address», «City», «PostalCode», «Country») rather than static text.
